naiveRule.rationale: Null-OCR stress hits 16 weight_or_volume rows with qty>1; 7 VL rows would incorrectly get un (kg bulk, counter-weight deli, em packs) with CALCULATION_RISK. Current DB only has 2 null-unit rows (Paccheri/Ginger) but rule is unsafe as general policy.

gateConditions: name embeds retail g/ml/cl measure (not kg/L purchase denomination)
name lacks pack-denomination markers (EMB, CX, CAIXA, PACK)
